   *   Renal failure/Transplant status (Acute kidney failure, unspecified; Kidney replaced by transplant; Anemia in chronic kidney disease).
   *   Severe malnutrition and infectious/orthopedic complications (Other severe protein-calorie malnutrition; Ulcer of ankle; Unspecified osteomyelitis, ankle and foot; Pyogenic arthritis, ankle and foot; Body Mass Index less than 19, adult).
